title: Questions
description: The 40 maturity questions (5 per dimension). Each question has 5 answer options mapping to DAMA-DMBOK maturity levels 1–5.

id.description: Unique ID in the form <dim_prefix>_<3-digit-number>, e.g. gov_001.

dimension.description: Dimension this question belongs to. Must match a dimension ID.

question.description: The question text. Plain English, no unexplained jargon.

help_text.description: Optional clarifying text shown beneath the question in the UI.

weight.description: Relative weight of this question within its dimension. Default 1.

options.description: Exactly 5 options, one per maturity level.

label.description: Concrete, observable description of what this answer looks like in practice.

allow_unknown.description: Whether to show an 'I don't know' option. Questions marked true will be excluded from scoring if the user selects it.
